title: jurinea gmelinii
intro: Jurinea gmelinii, also known as Gmelin's jurinea or Mongolian thistle, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jurinea gmelinii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Jurinea gmelinii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
